message:
refactor: aggregate overlapping reservations by peer bead in conflict detection

Refactor conflict detection in mission_loop to group multiple
overlapping paths/resources from the same peer bead holder into
single aggregated conflict entries. This reduces notification noise
and produces cleaner deconfliction messages.

New helpers:
- ReservationConflictBucket: groups overlapping paths by holder
- dedup_owned_strings: deduplicates string collections
- merge_conflict_bucket: aggregates overlapping reservations
- make_reservation_conflict_id: deterministic conflict IDs
- build_conflicting_beads: builds unique bead lists

Adds three tests validating aggregation for file and resource
reservation overlaps, plus formatting improvements throughout
conflict test assertions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
